languages.text: "Слуги Золотого Трона — Элане. Мы встревожены вашим молчанием. Доложите, что происходит в стане Корифея-еретика?"

traits.locale_text: "Слуги Золотого Трона — Элане. Мы встревожены вашим молчанием. Доложите, что происходит в стане Корифея-еретика?"

languages.text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."
languages.original_text: "Слуги Золотого Трона — Элане. Мы встревожены вашим молчанием. Доложите, что происходит в стане Корифея-еретика?"

traits.locale_text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."
"Ordos to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."

languages.text: “黄金王座仆从呼叫埃拉娜。你的沉默让我们很不安。异端教首的营地里有什么情况？请汇报。”
languages.original_text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."

traits.locale_text: “黄金王座仆从呼叫埃拉娜。你的沉默让我们很不安。异端教首的营地里有什么情况？请汇报。”

languages.text: « Serviteurs du Trône d'Or à Elana. Votre présence nous honore au plus haut point. Que se passe-t-il au camp du coryphée hérétique ? Nous attendons votre rapport. »
languages.original_text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."

traits.locale_text: « Serviteurs du Trône d'Or à Elana. Votre présence nous honore au plus haut point. Que se passe-t-il au camp du coryphée hérétique ? Nous attendons votre rapport. »

languages.text: "Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarından Elana'ya. Sessizliğinden endişe duyuyoruz. Kâfir Coryphaeus'un kampında neler oluyor? Rapor ver."
languages.original_text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."

traits.locale_text: "Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarından Elana'ya. Sessizliğinden endişe duyuyoruz. Kâfir Coryphaeus'un kampında neler oluyor? Rapor ver."

languages.text: «Sirvientes del Trono Dorado a Elana. Nos alarma su silencio. ¿Qué ocurre en el campamento del hereje Corifeo? Informe».
languages.original_text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."

traits.locale_text: «Sirvientes del Trono Dorado a Elana. Nos alarma su silencio. ¿Qué ocurre en el campamento del hereje Corifeo? Informe».

languages.text: "Diener des Goldenen Throns an Elana. Wir sind angesichts Eures Schweigens in Sorge. Was geht im Lager von Ketzer Coryphaeus vor? Sprecht."
languages.original_text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."

traits.locale_text: "Diener des Goldenen Throns an Elana. Wir sind angesichts Eures Schweigens in Sorge. Was geht im Lager von Ketzer Coryphaeus vor? Sprecht."

languages.text: 黄金の王座の使者、エレーナへ。君の沈黙に我々は不安を抱く。異端のコーリファウスの陣営では何が起きているのか。報告せよ。
languages.original_text: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."

traits.locale_text: 黄金の王座の使者、エレーナへ。君の沈黙に我々は不安を抱く。異端のコーリファウスの陣営では何が起きているのか。報告せよ。
